dataset: USLCI (U.S. Life Cycle Inventory Database) base, but global parameters are synthetic

pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh (RESULTS_DIR=/home/ga/LCA_Results) and task.json description; consistent across export_result.sh
Cross-referenced with verifier.py EXPECTED_PARAMS; reasonable production volume for commercial scenario

Verified against verifier.py; reasonable for PET bottles (20-25 gram range typical per https://www.wastecare.com/usefulinfo/PET-Plastic-Water-Soda-Bottles-Bale-Weights.htm and https://www.statista.com/statistics/974035/average-weight-polyethylene-terephthalate-bottles-by-type/)

Verified against verifier.py; 30% is an industry target per U.S. Plastics Pact and EU mandates (https://plasticmakers.org/plastic-recycling-facts/state-of-plastics-recycling/ and https://www.tomra.com/en/reverse-vending/media-center/feature-articles/drs-9-recycled-content-requirements)
Expected formula: annual_production * bottle_weight_g / 1000 (contains multiplication operator)
Expected formula: total_resin_kg * recycled_content_pct / 100 (contains multiplication operator)
Verified as real software at https://www.openlca.org/ with global parameters feature documented at https://greendelta.github.io/openLCA2-manual/parameters/index.html
Verified as real database maintained by NREL, publicly available via https://www.lcacommons.gov/lca-collaboration/National_Renewable_Energy_Laboratory/USLCI_Database_Public

privileged_info_summary: Task 'global_parameter_formulas@1' involves creating six global parameters in OpenLCA (3 input, 3 dependent) for a plastic bottle production scenario. Input parameters are: annual_production=1,000,000 bottles/year, bottle_weight_g=25g (reasonable for PET), recycled_content_pct=30% (industry 2030 target). Dependent parameters calculated via formulas: total_resin_kg=25,000kg (annual_production × bottle_weight_g ÷ 1000), virgin_resin_kg=17,500kg (total × (1 - recycled_pct)), recycled_resin_kg=7,500kg (total × recycled_pct). All mathematical calculations verified correct. CSV export expected at /home/ga/LCA_Results/parameter_summary.csv. Task uses USLCI database as base but creates synthetic parameters. All 14 metadata claims independently verified.
